task: Finish SponJIT exact L0 opcode coverage if it can be done honestly. Current exact L0 coverage is 75/85; remaining missing opcodes are GETUPVAL SETUPVAL GETTABUP GETTABLE GETI SETTABUP SETTABLE SETI POWK POW. Make a substantial final implementation pass. Do not introduce residuals, opcode helpers, fallback stubs, generic execute-opcode escapes, or fake coverage. Only mark an opcode exact if its semantics are actually represented by SSA -> Stencil IR -> native x64 lowering or by a genuinely exact structural VM boundary (not a generic fallback). Investigate and implement fact-specialized native table/array/upvalue variants only if existing explicit facts/payloads are sufficient; otherwise keep them unsupported with clear tests. Investigate POW/POWK only if exact Lua numeric/metamethod semantics can be represented honestly; otherwise keep unsupported. Rebuild stencils/bank if feasible. Run make test and make test-bank. Report whether strict semantic L0 reaches 85/85; if not, report exactly why each remaining opcode cannot honestly be covered yet.
